programs.name: SNAP (Food Assistance)
programs.description: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program provides food benefits
eligibilityRules: Income below 130% of federal poverty line
Work requirement may apply (exceptions for students, elderly, disabled)
documents: Social Security card or birth certificate
Proof of income (recent pay stubs, tax return)

programs.name: Medicaid
programs.description: Health insurance for low-income individuals and families
eligibilityRules: Income below state limits (varies by state)
Expansion states: income up to 138% of federal poverty line
documents: Proof of identity and Social Security number

programs.name: Section 8 Housing Vouchers
eligibilityRules: Income below 50% of area median income (AMI)
Preference given to homeless, displaced, or large families
documents: Proof of income (recent 2 years tax returns, pay stubs)
Proof of displacement or homelessness (if applicable)
Birth certificates for all family members

programs.name: LIHEAP (Energy Assistance)
programs.description: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program for utility bills
eligibilityRules: Income at or below 150% of federal poverty line
documents: Recent utility bills or lease showing utility responsibility

programs.name: TANF (Cash Assistance)
programs.description: Temporary Assistance for Needy Families provides cash support
eligibilityRules: Care for child under 18 or pregnant

programs.name: WIC (Nutrition for Mothers & Children)
programs.description: Women, Infants, and Children nutrition program
eligibilityRules: Income below 185% of federal poverty line

programs.name: EITC (Earned Income Tax Credit)
programs.description: Tax credit for working individuals with low to moderate income
eligibilityRules: Income below phase-out limit ($60,000+ depending on filing status)
documents: Tax return with W-2 or 1099 forms
Proof of valid Social Security number
